reviews.comment:
Gracias ACA, por seguir de pie... !!

(Translated by Google)
Thank you ACA, for still standing...!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcWR2X3RRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta bien para descansar un rato. Tienen mesas en un patio en la estación de servicio. Y si no vi mal, al lado de la misma hay una parrilla, que se veía bastante concurrida

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to rest for a while. They have tables in a patio at the gas station. And if I saw correctly, there's a grill next door, which looked quite busy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcVoyT2NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Espectacular. Desde hace añares que mantiene el bosque con los asientos y mesas para el descanso de los viajantes. El servicio en gral es excelente. La predisposición de los empleados siempre la mejor. El ACA siempre a la vanguardia.

(Translated by Google)
Spectacular. For years they've maintained the wooded area with benches and tables for travelers to rest. The service in general is excellent. The staff is always incredibly helpful. The ACA is always at the forefront.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzN3EyTkZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños limpios, se entiende que había mucha gente, el sitio de mesas bastante mugre en el piso

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were clean, which explains why there were a lot of people. The seating area had quite a bit of dirt on the floor.
